archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for High-End Professional Services

brand.name: Delt Alumni Excellence Center
brand.audience: Mid-career to senior professional men, ages 30-65
brand.tone: Independent, professional, trustworthy, dignified, high-end firm. Avoid collegiate, fundraising, or trendy aesthetics.
brand.footer_text: Built by Delts. Supported by Delts. Independent from expectations. Focused on your next chapter.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none text-slate-900 font-serif
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight text-slate-900 font-serif
hierarchy.overline: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-sans text-[#6B2C91] font-semibold

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Overlap elements slightly to break the corporate grid. Provide visual breathing room for mature audience.

buttons.primary: bg-[#6B2C91] hover:bg-[#562374] text-white font-sans font-medium px-8 py-4 rounded-none transition-colors shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-slate-300 hover:border-[#6B2C91] hover:text-[#6B2C91] text-slate-900 font-sans font-medium px-8 py-4 rounded-none transition-colors

components.cards: bg-white border border-slate-100 p-8 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
components.forms: Shadcn UI forms. Use sharp or slightly rounded corners (rounded-sm maximum). Active focus rings must be subtle #6B2C91. Frictionless, conversational.
components.modals: Centered Shadcn Dialogs. Must include 'X' or 'Cancel' to exit. Multi-step forms inside must include visual progress indicators (e.g., Step 1 of 3 or a progress bar).

sections.name: Above the Fold / Hero
sections.layout: Asymmetric bento. Large typography dominating the left. Subtle background image or minimal clean architecture on the right.
sections.copy: The Brotherhood shaped part of who you became. Now it's here for who you're becoming next.

sections.name: Info Gathering
sections.layout: Centered alignment, elegant typography. Lots of negative space.
sections.copy: WE WANT TO HEAR FROM YOU – HELP SHAPE OUR PROGRAMS

sections.name: Specific Challenge
sections.layout: Two column bento (5 cols image, 7 cols text with massive left padding).
sections.copy: Is there something you're trying to resolve right now?

sections.name: Affirmation & Email Capture
sections.layout: Full width dark slate section (bg-slate-900). White text. Inline email capture form.
sections.copy: Brotherhood for the life you're building now.
sections.cta: Be one of the first to know

sections.name: Expertise to Share
sections.layout: Two column inverted bento (7 cols text, 5 cols image).
sections.copy: Could your experience help another Brother?

sections.name: Pillars
sections.layout: 4-column strict grid. Minimalist icons (lucide-react). Categories: Work + Career, Management + Leadership, Life + Personal, Self-employment.

sections.name: Footer
sections.layout: Massive py-24 padding. Dark background (slate-950), subtle #6B2C91 top border.
sections.text: Built by Delts. Supported by Delts. Independent from expectations. Focused on your next chapter.

admin.description: Simple, professional admin login. Dashboard features a data table (Shadcn Table) to view collected alumni data with basic filters and pagination.

hero_background.description: Modern architectural interior with glass and steel. Use as a background with a heavy white/light-gray overlay (e.g. bg-white/90) to ensure text readability.

specific_challenge_image.description: A group of professional men shaking hands in a room. Use in the 'Specific Challenge' section to signify connection.

expertise_share_image.description: Two professional men collaborating. Use for 'Expertise to Share' section.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements and inputs MUST include 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='challenge-popup-step-1').

instructions_to_main_agent: Do not use default generic templates. Use 'Playfair Display' for Headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body to convey a high-end professional services firm.
Use '#6B2C91' sparingly—only for primary buttons, active links, or subtle decorative borders.
Ensure the two popup forms are implemented as centered Shadcn Dialogs and include a progress indicator.
Implement the landing page at '/' and the admin interface at '/login' and '/dashboard'.
Remember to include the exact footer text: 'Built by Delts. Supported by Delts. Independent from expectations. Focused on your next chapter.'
Never use placeholder images (like via.placeholder.com). Strictly use the provided 'media' URLs.
In the admin data table, provide a clear, professional presentation of the structured data (filters/pagination).
